summary: Iteration 2 backend tests for DoppelCrush growth endpoints — all 14 new tests passed. Verified /api/me/stats, /api/compare (create/join/get), new share kinds (story, square), and referral side-effects on stats.

minor.issue: funniest_mismatch is currently aliased to chaos_contrast (both = lowest cosine pair). Spec language separates them, but implementation uses pairs[-1] for both. Not failing tests, but consider differentiating (e.g., funniest_mismatch could be a mid-score pair) if product wants distinct semantics.
Participants array filters out users without photo_url, but participant_count still reflects the full participant list. Could be inconsistent if a user with no photo joins.

action_items: Optional: clarify product intent for funniest_mismatch vs chaos_contrast (currently identical).
Optional: align participants list and participant_count (filter rule mismatch).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: funniest_mismatch and chaos_contrast both set to pairs[-1]; appears semantically duplicate.
server.py compare GET: participants response is filtered by photo_url presence but participant_count uses unfiltered room['participants']; possible client mismatch.
server.py is 575 lines — still acceptable but approaching threshold; may want to split routes into modules soon.
test_credentials: Tests create disposable users per run (e.g., primary2+{ts}@example.com / crushme123). MONGO_URL + JWT_SECRET sourced from /app/backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: None; tests create their own users via /api/auth/signup with @example.com domains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 covers: /api/me/stats, /api/compare (POST/join/GET), share kinds story+square. All 14 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py pass. Iteration 1 suite (test_doppelcrush.py) was previously green and was not re-run. funniest_mismatch == chaos_contrast in current implementation — flagged as minor.
